name: Tortellini with Peas and Prosciutto
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 ounces prosciutto, fat trimmed, cut into thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook tortellini in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking. Drain thoroughly.
2. Meanwhile, bring cream to a boil in a heavy large saucepan. Reduce heat. Add nutmeg and simmer until slightly thickened, about 8 minutes.
3. Return tortellini to the pot. Add warm cream, Parmesan, peas, and prosciutto. Simmer over low heat until tortellini are tender and sauce thickens, stirring occasionally, about 4 minutes.
4. Season with salt and pepper. Divide among four warm bowls and serve.
